column2: Limited coverage: only 3 of 4 POIs completed (Governo Provincial da Lunda Norte, Assembleia De Deus Pentecostal, Escola De Magistério do Lucapa, all text-only). No verifiable 4th walkable POI: Places photo candidates were portraits, crowds, wrong towns, or transient shops; Parque de Lucapa is not walkable from centre
Google Places sparse for Paech'on-up: only Paechon Station and Paechon County verified near coords; no walkable market, park, or institutional POI found after multiple queries
